headline: How The Coca-Cola (KO) Investment Narrative Is Shifting With New Targets And Dividend Support
summary: Price targets on Coca-Cola have clustered in a tight band, with recent calls at US$87, US$88 and US$90, while model fair value sits at US$83.67. This gives you a clear sense of where expectations are being set. Research firms are pairing these targets with a renewed Top Pick label in North American consumer staples and upbeat feedback from recent conferences, which shapes how risk and reward are being framed for the stock. Read on to see what is driving this evolving narrative and how you can...
